Bouncy Castle Rentals in Moncton NB

Nova Kingdom Rentals offers bouncy castle rentals for events in Moncton NB. Dry bouncy castles, wet water slides, and interactive inflatables — perfect for birthday parties, school fun days, and community celebrations. Setup and takedown included. Available for selected events in New Brunswick — contact us to confirm availability and travel cost.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. New Brunswick bookings are available for selected larger events and special occasions — routine backyard rentals are not available in NB. Contact us to confirm availability, travel cost, and event suitability before planning.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, $310, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.
  • Crown Rush 42 - Large Inflatable, $450, Wet-use - Large 42ft water slide and obstacle course combo.
  • Crown Axe Challenge - Interactive Game, $180, Dry-use - Inflatable axe throwing for friendly competition.

Best For

  • Kids birthday parties
  • School events and fun days
  • Community and church events
  • Backyard summer parties

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer bouncy castle rentals in Moncton?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals offers bouncy castle rentals in Moncton NB for selected events. Contact us to confirm availability and travel cost for your event date.
What types of inflatables are available?
Dry bouncy castles, water slides, obstacle courses, interactive games (axe throw, kick darts), and combo units. Browse our full lineup at novakingdomrentals.com/rentals.
What is included with the rental?
Delivery, setup, and takedown are included with every rental. The blower stays on during use. Travel fees apply based on distance from Bridgewater.
Is booking confirmed after I submit the form?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Availability, travel cost, and pricing are confirmed before your rental is finalized.

Book a bouncy castle in Moncton
